description: Figma is a collaborative design and interface-development platform for creating files, components, prototypes, and related design-system assets. It also provides organization and developer features such as automation APIs, analytics, and AI-agent access to design context.
summary: Figma exposes a documented REST API at https://api.figma.com with OpenAPI, plus a hosted MCP server at https://mcp.figma.com/mcp using streamable HTTP and OAuth-based MCP discovery/registration.
